headline: Should You Buy The Home Depot, Inc. (HD)’s Shares?
summary: The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD) is one of the 10 Best Stocks to Buy in 2026 According to Billionaire D.E. Shaw. Home improvement retailer The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE:HD)’s shares have remained weak in 2026. They are down by 8.7% over the past year and by 2% year-to-date. 404 Media was out with an interesting […]
